title: Photography & Art
desc: I enjoy capturing daily life, ordinary objects, and small visual details that make the world feel more meaningful.

detail.body:
I enjoy photography and art because they help me notice everyday life more carefully. I like capturing daily objects, small moments, and the life around me, especially scenes from Vietnam and ordinary details that might otherwise be overlooked.

[IMAGE: assets/img/boat.jpg]

Painting and photography both help me slow down, observe more deeply, and enjoy life beyond school and technical work. I painted this one, tadaaa!

[IMAGE: assets/img/painted_this_myself.jpg]
